allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $files = @\("arrow hit.png", "damage sprite.png", "arrow.png"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\(\(Resolve-Path $f\)\); Write-Output "$f : $\($img.Width\) x $\($img.Height\)"; $img.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\(\(Resolve-Path "assets/props/arvore idle-Sheet.png"\)\); Write-Output "arvore idle-Sheet.png : $\($img.Width\) x $\($img.Height\)"; $img.Dispose\(\))
